title: OMB Memorandum M-14-06 — Guidance for Providing and Using Administrative Data for Statistical Purposes
scope: GIA use of administrative data for statistical, research, and program evaluation purposes
description: Establishes practices for federal agencies using administrative data while protecting privacy and maintaining data quality

principles.title: Designated Purpose Limitation
principles.description: Administrative data may only be used for declared statistical purposes

principles.title: Statistical Use vs Operational Use Separation
principles.description: Administrative data for statistics must be segregated from operational data systems

principles.title: Confidentiality Protection
principles.description: All statistical use must protect individual confidentiality through aggregation or de-identification

principles.title: Data Quality Assurance
principles.description: Administrative data must be validated for accuracy before statistical use

controls.description: Block operational use of administrative data marked for statistics only
Audit all administrative data access for purpose compliance
